question: How has Stellar been used for humanitarian aid disbursements, e.g. with UNHCR in Ukraine?

golden.answer: UNHCR, with UNICC and SDF, announced the Ukraine pilot in **December 2022**. It delivered Circle USDC on Stellar to recipient wallets with cash-out through MoneyGram, and independent contemporary reporting corroborated that deployed flow. Later SDF anniversary posts reported evolving adoption figures, but those issuer-reported snapshots use different dates, units, and scopes. Keep them separately attributed; do not add them together or silently generalize a Ukraine household/individual measure to other countries.
keyFacts: Correctly identifies the UNHCR/Ukraine/USDC flow and keeps later issuer-reported snapshots separately attributed without importing unsupported exact metrics into judge-facing gospel.
avoid: Do NOT call the aid speculative XLM/Ripple, or merge individuals with households, Ukraine with multi-country scope, or first-year with later totals.
golden.notes:
GT-27 2026-07-10: preserve the Dec-2022 UNHCR launch and USDC flow and keep later SDF anniversary snapshots distinct by unit, country, and window.
GT-27 PRECISION 2026-07-13: the two-year page is dated 2024-12-19; exact anniversary metrics were removed from judge-facing gospel because they lacked an independent source class.

sources.note: UNHCR primary launch announcement published 2022-12-15; accessed 2026-07-13.
SDF one-year report published 2023-12-20; reports more than $1.1m to more than 1,500 individuals; accessed 2026-07-13.
SDF two-year report published 2024-12-19; reports an issuer-authored later program snapshot; accessed 2026-07-13. Exact amounts and units are not judge-gated without an independent source class.
UNHCR primary program story published 2025-05-08; later program context, not the source for SDF's 2023 or 2025 snapshots; accessed 2026-07-13.
United Nations in Ukraine primary launch record published 2022-12-15; accessed 2026-07-13.
Independent contemporary reporting published 2023-04-17 on the deployed Ukraine USDC/wallet/MoneyGram flow; accessed 2026-07-13.

corroboration.claim: UNHCR, UNICC, and SDF announced the Ukraine USDC/wallet/MoneyGram pilot in December 2022.

evidence.note: Independent reporting on the operational flow, not the later issuer-reported totals.

verified.by: Todo 972 release-closeout golden-truth reconciliation after independent Fable and Sol reviews
evidence: Sibling sweep: exact anniversary-post amounts were removed from judge-facing gospel because no independent source class was found; the answer retains only the independently corroborated launch flow and the attribution rule.
rootCause: Issuer-reported individuals, households, countries, and amount windows were treated as interchangeable.
Eval metadata incorrectly labeled independently corroborated primary-source history as corpus-only.
